holdings.infoBox: ILDR is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.06%, Amazon.com at 5.20%, Alphabet at 5.16%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.83%, and Broadcom at 3.97%.

overview.description: The First Trust Innovation Leaders ETF (ILDR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks capital appreciation by targeting global companies believed to benefit from scientific and technological innovation. ILDR was launched on May 25, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.
